title: ModLoaderMP
description: An API that allowed ModLoader mods to support multiplayer.
body:
# ModLoaderMP
ModLoaderMP is an API that allows ModLoader mods to support multiplayer.

Requires Risugami's ModLoader to be installed.

**Note: This archive is incomplete and will be worked on over time.**

## Archival notice

This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was [originally created](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1272343-1-3-2-sdks-mods-v1-aug-18th-modloadermp-updated) Nov 24, 2010 by [ScottyDoesKnow](https://www.minecraftforum.net/members/ScottyDoesKnow). It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.

![SDK permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/archives/sdk-permission.png)
